books.title: The Sealed Nectar (Ar-Raheeq Al-Makhtum)
books.author: Safiur Rahman Mubarakpuri
books.notes: Award-winning biography of Prophet Muhammad (PBUH), winner of the First Islamic Conference prize.

books.title: BU-1-12 Taaruf-e-Quran
books.author: Dr. Israr Ahmed
books.notes: An introduction to the Quran covering its themes, structure, and significance in Urdu.

books.title: The Prophet
books.author: Gibran Khalil Gibran
books.notes: A philosophical and spiritual classic exploring life, love, and wisdom through poetic prose.

books.title: Rah-e-Nijat
books.author: Dr. Israr Ahmed
books.notes: A guide on the path to salvation in Islam, covering faith, deeds, and spiritual purification.

books.title: Quran - Translation
books.author: Abdullah Yusuf Ali
books.notes: A widely respected English translation of the Holy Quran with verse-by-verse commentary.
